property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: csrf_exempts_register_endpoint
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.2796896+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer dbbd3d06-8c1d-4a73-8247-6f35442e42bf","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: register_withEmail_creates_customer_and_sets_cookies
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.4017563+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer 4d92ee3e-b341-4df9-913f-2a8bf87b7c03","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: csrf_protects_logout_without_header
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.4962448+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer 14bc0f2c-72e0-492f-ae87-674060061c3a","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: register_duplicateEmail_returns_409
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.5759042+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer ba678c70-27cf-4899-9bfd-f41f0373d8eb","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: csrf_allows_logout_with_correct_header
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.6439375+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer 801c942a-ab75-4949-ad27-66cdf689e8a0","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: login_unknownUser_returns_401_without_timing_shortcut
testcase.system-out:
{"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.6922184+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Malformed password hash","logger":"org.springframework.security.crypto.argon2.Argon2PasswordEncoder","thread":"main","level":"WARN","level_value":30000,"stack_trace":"java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Last unit does not have enough valid bits

testcase.name: session_cookie_authenticates_me_endpoint
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.7421208+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer a907b3fc-174c-4e0a-8de0-cedb1a87e3a9","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: refresh_with_valid_token_rotates_session
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.8340463+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer 2aeb2e6c-866d-4f88-a3b8-54b913f133af","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: logout_revokes_session_in_db
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.9122782+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer 19d8847a-504c-4fca-99d7-0bedbda514f3","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: login_withEmail_succeeds_and_sets_cookies
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:15.9961264+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer 0e391374-11a5-4b0e-9cd7-a56a24856f45","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: csrf_exempts_login_endpoint
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:16.0699287+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer b6c0a97f-b8d0-4015-a634-463de6d8561b","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}

testcase.name: login_wrongPassword_returns_401
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-05-06T17:35:16.1358686+07:00","@version":"1","message":"Mail not configured â€” verification email skipped for customer 8a4922ce-0eb8-40e7-8efd-a4456afd5466","logger":"com.bigbike.bigbike_backend.service.customer.EmailVerificationService","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000}
